Title: OpenClaw: Pairing-scoped device tokens could mint `operator.admin` and reach node RCE
Description: In affected versions of `openclaw`, a caller holding only `operator.pairing` could use `device.token.rotate` to mint a new token with broader scopes for an already paired device. If the target device was approved for `operator.admin`, the attacker could obtain an administrative token without already holding administrative scope.
